hero.tagline: Settle into your home, not a rate you'll regret.
hero.subheadline: Independent mortgage broker out of Lowell, Massachusetts. Thirty-plus wholesale lenders shopping every file. One application, one team, your best rate.

creditStrip.credentialLine: Founded in Lowell by Mike Comerford · NMLS #{nmls} · {stateCount} states · {loCount} LOs

founderStrip.body: We started LMP in Lowell because the borrowers we wanted to serve were our neighbors. Today we are 22 loan officers across 9 states, shopping 30-plus wholesale lenders on every file. We answer Saturday calls. We come to closings. Lowell handshake, Stripe execution.
founderStrip.altText: Mike Comerford, President of LMP Financial

painPoints.headline: We've heard every version of this story.

items.title: Shopping multiple banks yourself
items.body: Three banks, three answers, no clarity. We submit one application to thirty-plus wholesale lenders, then bring back the strongest combination so you compare apples to apples.

items.title: Confusing rates and hidden fees
items.body: Teaser rates, points, lender credits, junk fees. We sit with the loan estimate line by line so you know exactly what you are paying for and what you are not.

items.title: Slow underwriting that kills deals
items.body: Most retail lenders move on their own clock. Wholesale shops pick up the phone. Our team works conditions the same day they hit, so the closing date holds.

items.title: Uncertain whether you'll be approved
items.body: Pre-approval should be a yes, or a clear path to yes. We tell you where you stand on day one, then build the file that gets you across. No vague maybes.

items.title: Language barriers in a major life decision
items.body: We work in English, Portuguese, and Spanish across our team. The biggest financial decision of your life should never get lost in translation, and your family should be able to follow along.

items.title: Self-employed income that confuses lenders
items.body: 1099, K-1, bank-statement, DSCR, rental income. We work with wholesale investors who actually underwrite non-W-2 income, not just check boxes and decline.

items.label: Average lifetime savings vs retail (Polygon Research / UWM, 2023 HMDA)

quizCTA.headline: Three minutes. Five questions. The right loan officer.
quizCTA.body: Tell us a little about your situation. We'll match you to the right program and the right LO.

articles.title: FHA vs Conventional in NH
articles.excerpt: When 3.5% down and a 580 score makes more sense than 5% down and 620.

articles.title: MassHousing $30K Down Payment Assistance
articles.excerpt: Income tiers, eligibility, and how it stacks with FHA.

articles.title: Wholesale vs Retail: Why It Matters
articles.excerpt: What it means when we shop 30+ wholesale lenders for you.

processSteps.headline: Six steps from intro call to keys.

items.title: Intro Call
items.body: A 15-minute conversation with the LO who fits your state, your language, and your situation. We listen first, ask questions second, recommend programs third.

items.title: Documents
items.body: Income, assets, ID. We send a clean checklist, you upload securely, we handle the rest. Most files are document-complete within 2 to 3 days.

items.title: Lender Shop
items.body: We submit your file to multiple wholesale lenders and bring back the strongest combination of rate, fees, and program fit. Same week, every time.

items.title: Application
items.body: Pre-approval letter in hand, you make the offer. When the offer wins, we move straight to full application with the chosen lender, no restart, no re-typing.

items.title: Underwriting
items.body: We push the file through, work conditions same-day, and keep you and your realtor in the loop with weekly written updates. No silent stretches.

items.title: Close
items.body: Final numbers, closing disclosure, signing day. You get the keys. We send a closing gift, and we are still here for the refinance, the next home, your kids' first home.
